commands.narrative:
## 2026-06-07 Daily Report

**Roster:** No changes since yesterday — 150 strategies total (144 enabled, 6 disabled). All 13 open action items remain PROPOSED. The kill backlog is 5 days old with zero executions.

### Headline: Pipeline Intermittently Stalling (Day 5 pattern); v25 Edge Recovered; 50+ INVALID Strategies Running

The diagnose at 11:00 UTC showed PIPELINE_STALLED (T+30 callback silent for 1136s). By 11:12 the pipeline recovered (snapshot: HEALTHY, last_t30_callback=130s). This is the recurring Day 5 pattern: the stall fires and then self-recovers, but each occurrence bleeds shadow trades. Only 2 trades were collected in the stall window today. The bot also restarted around 11:17 UTC (Railway redeploy). Numbers below reflect the Jun 6 data snapshot carried forward.

### v25-bot-excl-climbing: Edge Recovered — Promotion Proposal

The watchlist hold (ai-2026-06-02-006) was justified when the edge flag was DECAYING for 4 days (Jun 2-5). As of Jun 6's data, the flag has reverted to STRENGTHENING (last_25 mean = +5.57% vs overall mean = -5.48%). All 4 promotion gates clear: n=619, drop3=+1.065 SOL, total=+3.386 SOL, monthly=+4.26 SOL/mo. Composite score = 92.1 (highest in roster).

**Caution:** Monthly run rate has declined from +12.56 SOL/mo (May 31) to +4.26 SOL/mo (Jun 6) — still above the 3.75 bar but the trajectory is bearish. Panel 11 returned 0 rows — regime gate unverifiable. Recommend live trial with 7-day watch; kill if monthly drops below 3.75.

### Kill Backlog: 50+ INVALID Strategies (5-Day Escalation)

All kill proposals from June 2-6 remain PROPOSED with 0 executions. Most expensive unexecuted kills: v35/v39 families (-17 to -20 SOL/mo each), v43 trail-SL variants (-8 to -10 SOL/mo), v40-top5-tight (-8.80 SOL/mo), v42 breakeven family (-3 to -9 SOL/mo across 5 variants), v32/v33/v34 climbing mirrors (-2 to -3 SOL/mo, 4th request). Operator must execute the June 2-5 kill batch as a single push.

### Near-Bar Watch

- **v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono** (n=97, score=90.1): drop3=+1.242, monthly=+3.11 (gap -0.64). 3 trades from n=100. STRENGTHENING.
- **v9shadow-velmono-dev** (n=94, score=87.2): drop3=+0.768, monthly=+2.05 (gap -1.70). 6 trades from n=100. Monthly gap large.

Both blocked by the recurring T+30 stall pattern.

### Cross-Day Patterns

No roster changes for 7+ days. All action items PROPOSED, none executed. The June 2 kill batch has been re-proposed every day for 5 days. Recommend the operator treat the full backlog as a single action rather than reviewing each kill individually.

9 strategies DECAYING: v9shadow-vel20-top5 (INVALID), v37-flow-sells-light (INVALID), v40-vel-band (INVALID) are highest priority kills.

action_items.summary: Promote v25-bot-excl-climbing to live trial. All 4 gates clear (n=619, drop3=+1.065, total=+3.386, monthly=+4.26). Edge recovered to STRENGTHENING. Watch monthly run rate weekly.

CRITICAL (Day 5): Recurring T+30 stall — fires and self-recovers but bleeds trades each time. Bot also restarted Jun 7 ~11:17 UTC. Investigate PriceCollector emit path for intermittent silence and stability of deployment.
